name: Qualified Real Property Business Indebtedness Election

eligibility.description: Debt must have been incurred in connection with real property used in a trade or business and the taxpayer must elect this treatment.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers (other than C corps) to exclude income from the discharge of debt secured by real property used in a trade or business by reducing the basis of depreciable real property.
